title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build a real-world multi-agent AI system using LangGraph for an AI Travel Planning System. The system coordinates four specialized agents (Flight, Hotel, Itinerary, and Final Response) that work together with memory management via PostgreSQL and integrate real-time APIs.
